title: hellerorchis schlechteri
intro: Hellerorchis schlechteri, also known as the Heller's orchid, is a rare and endangered orchid species native to New Guinea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hellerorchis schlechteri include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Hellerorchis schlechteri can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots are also used in traditional medicine to make a medicinal paste.
